parents.subject: LU-19253 target: get all NIDs at start in one call

commit.subject: LU-12186 utils: Add parity flag to correct places
commit.message:
LU-12186 utils: Add parity flag to correct places

The LCME_FL_PARITY flag was not added in all the
places it needed to be added to allow it to be
used in layouts from userspace.  Add this.

Remove LOV_PATTERN_PARITY from supported since it is
not actually supported yet.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Idf9a7db3b770842914bd0331583864fc99f329a5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60586
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Zhenyu Xu <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
